faqData.question: What to wear?
faqData.answer: Our dress code is Gray or any touch of Blue close to that color. We'd love our guests to dress in smart casual or semi-formal attire in this palette. Please avoid wearing white so the bride can shine.

faqData.question: Where's the reception?
faqData.answer: Family Farm Resort, Brgy. Pacac, Guimba Nueva Ecija

faqData.question: Arrival
faqData.answer: To ensure everything runs smoothly, please arrive at least 30 minutes before the ceremony starts. This will give you time to find your seat, take in the beautiful setup, and be fully present for our special moment.

faqData.question: Can I bring someone with me?
faqData.answer:
Please understand that as much as we want to celebrate our wedding with you all, we have to be honest; we can’t invite everyone.

Due to the intimate nature of our wedding and limited space / seats on the venue. We kindly ask for your understanding that only people we can accommodate are those who have formally confirmed their presence / attendance. So, strictly NO PLUS ONE. as it ensures that every guest has a comfortable experience.

Your cooperation in respecting our policy of not bringing uninvited guests are sincerely appreciated. Thank you for helping us create an intimate and memorable celebration.
